psychologicalTheme: Pragmatic refugee survivors. Anxious attachment — burned before, hypervigilant about threats. Type 6 (Loyalist) with adventurer wing: seeks security through alliances but has an escape plan. Moderate personality across the board with slightly elevated neuroticism from refugee trauma. Under stress, becomes image-conscious and arrogant (Type 3 direction) — overcompensating survival mode. Moderate Machiavellianism from generations of making deals to survive. The galaxy's ultimate pragmatists.
